case_title: SIVAN WILENSKY VS. CALIFORNIA RESTAURANT LIQUIDATORS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RESTAURANT LIQUIDATORS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY WILENSKY, SIVAN AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RESTAURANT LIQUIDATORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILENSKY, SIVAN AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RESTAURANT LIQUIDATORS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
